---
title: "WQ Paper"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
#install.packages("ggmap")

library(data.table)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
#library(ggmap)
# Loading the water quality data takes about 2 min
options(timeout=300)

# Load data tables
client <- "64fa7fd74d72d707046be70b19a3963b" # Insert your client ID here (find it in the mwater download URL)

```

LifeStraw

```{r}
LifeStraw <- as.data.table(read.csv(
  sprintf("https://api.mwater.co/v3/datagrids/%s/download?client=%s&format=csv", "d59d21fdd4e5478ebbfb06897d501a33", client), 
  stringsAsFactors = T, na.strings = c("NA", ""), colClasses=c(Submitted_DateTime="POSIXct", Collected_DateTime="POSIXct", Incubation_Start_DateTime="POSIXct", Incubation_End_DateTime="POSIXct"))
)

# Filter by waterpoint to exclude WQ results for filters
#LifeStraw.WP <- LifeStraw[WaterPoint_or_Filter == "Water point"]
# Order data by date
#LifeStraw.WP <- LifeStraw.WP[order(Submitted_DateTime)]
# Add a cumulative count column and label
LifeStraw.WP[, cumulative_count := .I]
LifeStraw.WP[, Label := "LifeStraw - Kenya"]
```

Asili

```{r}
#Currently contains only baseline WQ data. May need to filter in the future for only water points. 
Asili <- as.data.table(read.csv(
  sprintf("https://api.mwater.co/v3/datagrids/%s/download?client=%s&format=csv", "72828d483b4e4ed9ba6c9c578e3709bf", client), 
  stringsAsFactors = T, na.strings = c("NA", ""), colClasses=c(Submission.date="POSIXct"))
)
# Order data by date
Asili <- Asili[order(Submission.date)]
# Add a cumulative count column and label
Asili[, cumulative_count := .I]
Asili[, Label := "Asili - DRC"]

```

Amazi Meza

```{r}
Amazi <- as.data.table(read.csv(
  sprintf("https://api.mwater.co/v3/datagrids/%s/download?client=%s&format=csv", "9613d32ce08f46908b1180b6c8e99e58", client), 
  stringsAsFactors = T, na.strings = c("NA", ""), colClasses=c(Submitted_DateTime="POSIXct", Collected_DateTime="POSIXct", Incubation_Start_DateTime="POSIXct", Incubation_End_DateTime="POSIXct"))
)

# Step 1: Create Amazi_monitoring with only "2025 Valver monitoring campaign" deployments
#Amazi_monitoring <- Amazi %>%
 # filter(Deployment == "2025 Valver monitoring campaign")

# Step 2: Filter Amazi so it includes only rows with School_IDs found in Amazi_monitoring
#Amazi <- Amazi %>%
  f#ilter(School_ID %in% Amazi_monitoring$School_ID)

# Filter by waterpoint to exclude WQ results for filters
Amazi.WP <- Amazi[WaterPoint_or_Filter == "Water point"]
# Order data by date
Amazi.WP <- Amazi.WP[order(Collected_DateTime)]
# Add a cumulative count column and label
Amazi.WP[, cumulative_count := .I]
Amazi.WP[, Label := "Amazi Meza - Rwanda"]
```

DRC WASH

```{r}
DRC <- as.data.table(read.csv(
  sprintf("https://api.mwater.co/v3/datagrids/%s/download?client=%s&format=csv", "df35cdf1fd06431ba787e7a500061dff", "04fa81950005265980b0d25a763daab4"), 
  stringsAsFactors = T, na.strings = c("NA", ""), colClasses=c(Date="POSIXct"))
)
# Order data by date
DRC <- DRC[order(Date)]
# Add a cumulative count column and label
DRC[, cumulative_count := .I]
DRC[, Label := "DRC WASH - DRC"]
```

DRIP

```{r}
DRIP <- as.data.table(read.csv(
  sprintf("https://api.mwater.co/v3/datagrids/%s/download?client=%s&format=csv", "0689d6c952bd4db990adff37927f6448", client), 
  stringsAsFactors = T, na.strings = c("NA", ""), colClasses=c(Submitted.On="POSIXct"))
)
DRIP <- DRIP %>% rename(Latitude = Latitude.of.Create.Borehole.Unique.ID...GPS.Location)
DRIP <- DRIP %>% rename(Longitude = Longitude.of.Create.Borehole.Unique.ID...GPS.Location)

# Filter by present\absent to exclude househods without WQ results
DRIP <- DRIP[E..coli %in% c("Present", "Absent")]
# Order data by date
DRIP <- DRIP[order(Submitted.On)]
# Add a cumulative count column and label
DRIP[, cumulative_count := .I]
DRIP[, Label := "DRIP - Kenya"]
```

```{r}

Helvetas <- as.data.table(read.csv(
  sprintf("https://api.mwater.co/v3/datagrids/%s/download?client=%s&format=csv", "26cb407edb354a4382ef4f2c828a9f72", client),
  stringsAsFactors = T, na.strings = c("NA", ""), colClasses=c(Submitted.On="POSIXct"))
)

# Add a cumulative count column and label
Helvetas[, cumulative_count := .I]
Helvetas[, Label := "Helvetas - Madagascar"]
```

Amazi Water (Burundi)

```{r}
# Coordinates are in the sites datagrid (the WQ grid has no GPS columns)
Burundi <- as.data.table(read.csv(
  sprintf("https://api.mwater.co/v3/datagrids/%s/download?client=%s&format=csv", "9675b5ce45e849578014ef9cf09d9b43", client),
  stringsAsFactors = T, na.strings = c("NA", ""))
)
Burundi <- Burundi %>% rename(Latitude = `Latitude.of.GPS.Location`)
Burundi <- Burundi %>% rename(Longitude = `Longitude.of.GPS.Location`)

# Add a cumulative count column and label
Burundi[, cumulative_count := .I]
Burundi[, Label := "Amazi Water - Burundi"]
```

Water Mission (Tanzania)

```{r}
# Coordinates are in the sites datagrid (the WQ grid has no GPS columns)
WaterMission <- as.data.table(read.csv(
  sprintf("https://api.mwater.co/v3/datagrids/%s/download?client=%s&format=csv", "0fe1a4c959dc49d0b842550dd526c15d", client),
  stringsAsFactors = T, na.strings = c("NA", ""))
)
WaterMission <- WaterMission %>% rename(Latitude = `Latitude.of.GPS.Location`)
WaterMission <- WaterMission %>% rename(Longitude = `Longitude.of.GPS.Location`)

# Add a cumulative count column and label
WaterMission[, cumulative_count := .I]
WaterMission[, Label := "Water Mission - Tanzania"]
```

Temporal Graph

```{r}
# Rename the date columns for consistency
setnames(Amazi.WP, "Collected_DateTime", "Date")
setnames(Asili, "Submission.date", "Date")
setnames(LifeStraw.WP, "Submitted_DateTime", "Date")
setnames(DRC, "Date", "Date")
setnames(DRIP, 
         old = c("Submitted.On", "Latitude.of.Create.Borehole.Unique.ID...GPS.Location", "Longitude.of.Create.Borehole.Unique.ID...GPS.Location"),
         new = c("Date", "Latitude", "Longitude"))

# Combine all datasets into one
graph_data <- rbindlist(list(Amazi.WP, Asili, LifeStraw.WP, DRIP), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# Plot the data
ggplot(graph_data, aes(x = Date, y = cumulative_count, color = Label)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Cumulative Number of WQ Results", title = "Temporal Variability of Water Quality Test Results", Label = "Project/Country") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Amazi Meza - Rwanda" = "blue", "Asili - DRC" = "red", "LifeStraw - Kenya" = "green", "DRIP - Kenya" = "orange"))


```

Interactive Map

9 missing rows are from DRIP - Kenya

```{r}
map_data <- rbindlist(list(Amazi.WP, Asili, LifeStraw.WP, Helvetas, DRIP, Burundi, WaterMission), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

leaflet(map_data) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addCircleMarkers(~Longitude, ~Latitude, color = ~Label,
                   popup = ~paste("Source:", Label),
                   radius = 3, fillOpacity = 1.2)


```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(ggspatial)
library(ggrepel)

# Clean and convert data
map_data_clean <- map_data[!is.na(Latitude) & !is.na(Longitude), ]
map_data_sf <- st_as_sf(map_data_clean, coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4326)

# Get Africa map and centroids
africa <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", continent = "Africa", returnclass = "sf")
africa_centroids <- st_point_on_surface(africa)  # label positions
bbox <- st_bbox(map_data_sf)
pad <- 1.5  # degrees of padding

# Plot
p <- ggplot(data = africa) +
  geom_sf(fill = "antiquewhite", color = "gray40") +
  geom_sf(data = map_data_sf, aes(color = Label), size = 2) +
  geom_sf_text(data = africa_centroids, aes(label = name), size = 3, color = "gray20") +
  annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.5) +
  annotation_north_arrow(location = "tl", which_north = "true",
                         style = north_arrow_fancy_orienteering) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(bbox["xmin"] - pad, bbox["xmax"] + pad),
    ylim = c(bbox["ymin"] - pad, bbox["ymax"] + pad),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(title = "Baseline Water Quality Locations", color = "Project/Country")

# Save as PDF
ggsave("africa_water_projects_map.pdf", plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)


```
